note: The Admissions section describes the process but gives no fixed dates: the complete schedule is announced by TSCHE. Placeholders are kept until official dates are added — do not invent dates.

deadlines.process: Category A seats are filled by the Convener, TSEAMCET Admissions. Apply online through Convener-TSEAMCET after the TSEAMCET notification is released.
deadlines.note: not available — complete schedule is given by TSCHE

deadlines.process: Category B seats are filled by the college per TSCHE guidelines. Apply through the college website; the form appears in the Admissions tab when TSCHE gives the notification.
deadlines.note: not available — complete schedule is given by TSCHE

eligibility: 10+2 with MPC as major subjects; selection via TS EAMCET.
